name: UnrealGenAISupport
description: An Unreal Engine plugin for LLM/GenAI models & MCP UE5 server. Includes OpenAI's GPT, Deepseek, Claude Sonnet/Opus APIs, Google Gemini 3, Alibaba Qwen, Kimi, and Grok 4.1, with plans to add TTS, Elevenlabs, Inworld, OpenRouter, Groq, Dashscope, Responses APIs, UnrealClaude soon. UnrealMCP is also here!! Automatic scene generation from AI!!
readme_summary: This Unreal Engine plugin integrates various Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI (GenAI) models directly into the game development workflow. It simplifies the process of using AI for tasks like scene generation, NPC behavior, and content creation within Unreal Engine, supporting a wide range of popular AI APIs.
key_features: Integration of multiple LLM/GenAI APIs (OpenAI, Deepseek, Claude, Gemini, Qwen, Kimi, Grok)
Automatic scene generation from AI prompts
NPC agentic instance creation
Blueprint, function, variable generation and manipulation via AI
Component addition and Python script execution via AI
Support for Unreal Engine 5.4.4
Focus on APIs useful for game development, evals, and interactive experiences
primary_use_case: To enable Unreal Engine developers to easily integrate and leverage cutting-edge LLM and Generative AI capabilities for in-game content creation, dynamic world generation, and intelligent NPC behavior.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan in a bustling Unreal Engine workshop, holding a magical paintbrush that glows with digital energy. With each stroke, the paintbrush conjures intricate 3D game assets and dynamic scenes from thin air, directly onto a virtual canvas representing the game world. Floating around the artisan are various AI model icons (like a stylized brain for LLM, a camera for image gen) feeding streams of data into the paintbrush. Subtle UI elements showing code snippets and AI prompts are visible on nearby screens. The scene is rendered in a vibrant, 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing creativity and technological fusion.

name: semtools
description: Semantic search and document parsing tools for the command line
readme_summary: SemTools is a high-performance command-line interface (CLI) tool built in Rust for semantic search and document parsing. It allows users to parse various document formats, perform local semantic keyword searches using multilingual embeddings, and interact with documents via an AI agent for question answering.
key_features: Fast semantic search using model2vec embeddings
Reliable document parsing with caching and error handling
Unix-friendly design with proper stdin/stdout handling
Configurable distance thresholds and returned chunk sizes
Multi-format support for parsing documents (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, etc.)
Concurrent processing for better parsing performance
Workspace management for efficient document retrieval over large collections
primary_use_case: Enabling efficient semantic search and AI-powered question answering over local document collections directly from the command line.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian in a vast, futuristic library, holding a glowing magnifying glass over a stack of diverse documents (PDFs, DOCX). The magnifying glass projects a shimmering, abstract network of interconnected ideas onto a nearby screen, representing semantic understanding. As the librarian points to a specific document, relevant snippets of text and AI-generated answers materialize as glowing orbs floating around the screen. Subtle lines of code and data streams flow between the documents and the screen, with the 'SemTools' logo subtly integrated into the library's architecture. The scene is rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style, with a warm, inviting color palette and soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing clarity and intelligence.

name: aether
description: Aether, create Omarchy themes the easy way.
readme_summary: Aether is a visual theming application for Omarchy and other Linux desktops. It allows users to extract color palettes from wallpapers, apply them to various applications, and manage themes through a graphical interface or command line.
key_features: Color Extraction from wallpapers
Wallpaper Browser (wallhaven.cc, local files)
Image Filters (blur, exposure, presets)
Color Presets (Dracula, Nord, Gruvbox, Catppuccin)
Base16 Import
Theme Blueprints (JSON)
Multi-App Support (15+ apps)
Theme Scheduler
primary_use_case: To easily create and apply cohesive desktop themes by extracting colors from wallpapers, supporting a wide range of applications.
cover_image_prompt: A digital artist's studio bathed in soft, ambient light. In the center, a large, ornate frame displays a beautiful landscape wallpaper. From the wallpaper, streams of vibrant color particles flow like liquid into a palette on a digital easel, where they coalesce into a harmonious color scheme. The artist, represented by a stylized, glowing cursor, is subtly adjusting the colors with a digital brush. Around the easel, small, stylized icons of various applications (like a terminal, a text editor, and a system monitor) are connected by glowing lines, showing the theme being applied. The repository name 'Aether' is subtly integrated into the design of the easel. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a focus on the flow of color and light.

name: nightingale
description: Nightingale is to monitoring and alerting what Grafana is to visualization.
readme_summary: Nightingale is an open-source alerting and monitoring system designed to work with existing data sources. It focuses on efficient processing and distribution of alarms, offering capabilities similar to Grafana but with a stronger emphasis on the alerting engine.
key_features: Open-source alerting expert
Connects with various existing data sources (e.g., VictoriaMetrics, ElasticSearch)
Configurable alerting and notification rules
AI assistant integration via MCP-Server for natural language interaction
Supports Prometheus Remote Write protocol
Distributed deployment mode for edge data centers
Developed by DiDi.inc, donated to CCF ODTC
primary_use_case: To provide a robust and intelligent alerting system for monitoring infrastructure and applications, integrating with existing data sources and offering advanced alarm processing and distribution.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant conductor standing in front of a grand orchestra, with musical scores transforming into streams of glowing data that flow into a central, pulsating 'alarm' hub. The conductor's baton directs the flow, ensuring each data stream is harmonized into clear, actionable alerts. Subtle digital interfaces displaying metrics and alert statuses are visible on nearby podiums. The scene is set in a modern, dimly lit concert hall with dramatic spotlights on the conductor and the alarm hub. The overall mood is one of controlled power and precision. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a sophisticated color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing oranges, emphasizing the 'Nightingale' name subtly etched on the conductor's podium.

name: RuView
description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
readme_summary: RuView is an edge AI perception system that uses commodity WiFi signals to perform real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection without cameras or wearables. It analyzes Channel State Information (CSI) disturbances to reconstruct body position and physiological data, operating entirely on low-power hardware like ESP32.
key_features: WiFi DensePose for human pose estimation
Vital sign monitoring (breathing rate, heart rate)
Presence detection
Edge AI system running on low-power hardware (ESP32)
Self-learning and adaptation without cameras or cloud infrastructure
Real-time signal analysis using CSI
primary_use_case: Enabling non-visual, real-time human sensing and monitoring in environments using existing WiFi infrastructure.
cover_image_prompt: A conceptual illustration of a person's skeletal pose and vital signs (heartbeat, breathing) being visualized as glowing, ethereal energy patterns emanating from invisible WiFi signals within a room. The WiFi signals, depicted as subtle, shimmering waves, are the sole input, weaving through the air and coalescing into a clear, three-dimensional human form and vital sign readouts. Small, minimalist UI elements showing data streams and the RuView logo are subtly integrated into the background. The scene should evoke a sense of 'seeing the unseen' through technology, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a soft, ambient glow. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear, glowing energy forms against a slightly desaturated room environment.

name: maplibre-gl-js
description: MapLibre GL JS - Interactive vector tile maps in the browser
readme_summary: MapLibre GL JS is an open-source JavaScript library for displaying interactive vector tile maps on websites and web applications. It leverages GPU acceleration for fast rendering and originated as a fork of mapbox-gl-js.
key_features: Interactive vector tile maps
GPU-accelerated rendering
Open-source fork of mapbox-gl-js
Customizable map styles
Support for various map layers (e.g., heatmaps, 3D buildings)
primary_use_case: Embedding interactive, high-performance maps into web applications.
cover_image_prompt: A digital cartographer, depicted as a skilled artisan, meticulously crafting a vibrant, detailed world map on a large, glowing holographic display. Streams of data, represented by glowing lines and abstract shapes, flow from various sources into the cartographer's tools, being transformed into intricate map features like roads, buildings, and terrain. The display shows a live, interactive map with zoom and pan capabilities. Subtle UI elements resembling code snippets and data visualizations are integrated into the holographic interface. The scene is set in a modern, minimalist studio with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing the creation process. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a futuristic, yet accessible aesthetic, capturing the essence of bringing digital maps to life.
